_note: Canonical scam-tactic exemplars. The semantic_similarity stage compares utterances against these; the knowledge_base stage surfaces the matched advisory. Replace the bag-of-words fallback with real sentence-embeddings in production.

exemplars.text: you are under digital arrest stay on the video call do not disconnect
exemplars.advisory: Digital arrest is fake; hang up immediately.

exemplars.text: aap digital arrest mein hain phone band mat karo kisi ko mat batao
exemplars.advisory: No agency arrests over a call; disconnect and report.

exemplars.text: a parcel in your name was seized by customs it contains drugs
exemplars.advisory: Courier 'seized parcel' calls are a scam entry point.

exemplars.text: transfer the money to the rbi safe account to prove your innocence
exemplars.advisory: No one needs your money to prove innocence.

exemplars.text: share the otp and your cvv for verification
exemplars.advisory: Never share OTP/CVV; officials never ask.

exemplars.text: your kyc is incomplete your account will be suspended update now
exemplars.advisory: Banks don't suspend accounts via SMS links.

exemplars.text: your computer is infected install anydesk so we can fix it
exemplars.advisory: Never install remote-access apps for cold callers.

exemplars.text: approve the collect request to receive your refund
exemplars.advisory: Approving a collect request sends money, not receives it.

exemplars.text: we recorded your video it will be leaked unless you pay
exemplars.advisory: Do not pay; report sextortion to 1930.

exemplars.text: congratulations you won the kbc lottery pay the processing fee to claim
exemplars.advisory: Lotteries you never entered are always fake.

exemplars.text: guaranteed high returns double your money join the trading group
exemplars.advisory: Guaranteed returns are a hallmark of investment fraud.

exemplars.text: your loan is pre approved just pay the processing fee first
exemplars.advisory: Legit lenders deduct fees from disbursal, not upfront.

exemplars.text: work from home part time job pay a small registration fee to start
exemplars.advisory: Real jobs don't charge you to start.
